mapper.insert: insert ignore into t_stake_hosting_user_reward_summary (user_id, diff_reward_amount, same_level_reward_amount, global_dividend_amount) values (#{userId}, 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000)

insert into t_stake_hosting_user_reward_summary (user_id, diff_reward_amount, same_level_reward_amount, global_dividend_amount) values (#{userId}, #{amount}, 0.000000, 0.000000) on duplicate key update diff_reward_amount = diff_reward_amount + values(diff_reward_amount)

insert into t_stake_hosting_user_reward_summary (user_id, diff_reward_amount, same_level_reward_amount, global_dividend_amount) values (#{userId}, 0.000000, #{amount}, 0.000000) on duplicate key update same_level_reward_amount = same_level_reward_amount + values(same_level_reward_amount)

insert into t_stake_hosting_user_reward_summary (user_id, diff_reward_amount, same_level_reward_amount, global_dividend_amount) values (#{userId}, 0.000000, 0.000000, #{amount}) on duplicate key update global_dividend_amount = global_dividend_amount + values(global_dividend_amount)
